'''shapate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jurisprudentially|jurisprudentially]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-p-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jurisprudentially|jurisprudentially]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| shapate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:shapate|shapate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shapatesher|shapatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapatesherĂ«m|shapatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shapatero|shapatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shapateshĂ«|shapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapateshĂ«m|shapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishapatero|gokishapatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishapateshĂ«|gokishapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapateshĂ«m|gokishapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshapankerom|goshapankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshapankeshĂ«|goshapankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapankeshĂ«m|goshapankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshapankeya|goshapankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shapaterom|shapaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapatemu|shapatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shapateya|shapateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishapaterom|gokishapaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapatemu|gokishapatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishapateya|gokishapateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:shapapate|shapapate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shapapatesher|shapapatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapapatesherĂ«m|shapapatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shapapatero|shapapatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shapapateshĂ«|shapapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapapateshĂ«m|shapapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishapapatero|gokishapapatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishapapateshĂ«|gokishapapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapapateshĂ«m|gokishapapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshapapankerom|goshapapankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshapapankeshĂ«|goshapapankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapapankeshĂ«m|goshapapankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshapapankeya|goshapapankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shapapaterom|shapapaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapapatemu|shapapatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shapapateya|shapapateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishapapaterom|gokishapapaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapapatemu|gokishapapatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishapapateya|gokishapapateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:shĂŠpĂŠte|shĂŠpĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shĂŠpĂŠtesher|shĂŠpĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠpĂŠtesherĂ«m|shĂŠpĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shĂŠpĂŠtero|shĂŠpĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«|shĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m|shĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishĂŠpĂŠtero|gokishĂŠpĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«|gokishĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m|gokishĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshĂŠpĂŠnkerom|goshĂŠpĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«|goshĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«m|goshĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshĂŠpĂŠnkeya|goshĂŠpĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shĂŠpĂŠterom|shĂŠpĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠpĂŠtemu|shĂŠpĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shĂŠpĂŠteya|shĂŠpĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishĂŠpĂŠterom|gokishĂŠpĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishĂŠpĂŠtemu|gokishĂŠpĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishĂŠpĂŠteya|gokishĂŠpĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:shafpafte|shafpafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shafpaftesher|shafpaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafpaftesherĂ«m|shafpaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shafpaftero|shafpaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafpafteshĂ«|shafpafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafpafteshĂ«m|shafpafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishafpaftero|gokishafpaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafpafteshĂ«|gokishafpafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafpafteshĂ«m|gokishafpafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshafpafnkerom|goshafpafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafpafnkeshĂ«|goshafpafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafpafnkeshĂ«m|goshafpafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshafpafnkeya|goshafpafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shafpafterom|shafpafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafpaftemu|shafpaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shafpafteya|shafpafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishafpafterom|gokishafpafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafpaftemu|gokishafpaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishafpafteya|gokishafpafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
